rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: Peninsula trims debt as lender backs equity swap for US uranium project
news.snippet: Peninsula Energy cut debt after US$4.1M of loans from Davidson Kempner were converted to equity, reducing debt to US$4.2M and marking a second trim of its US$15M facility.

news.title: ASX rises ahead of Trump deadline; Oil climbs
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has closed higher ahead of a deadline that President Donald Trump has set to bomb Iranian power plants.

news.title: Four-day week and robot tax: How tech giant plans to survive AI apocalypse
news.snippet: A blueprint released by OpenAI boss Sam Altman includes ideas to socialise the monetary gains from AI by giving people “a stake in AI driven economic growth”.

news.title: TMK continues to turn up the gas at Mongolian pilot project
news.snippet: TMK Energy has continued to increase gas flows at its Gurvantes XXXV project in Mongolia, with pilot wells hitting new highs and gaining momentum towards commercial production.

news.title: True North revs up as high-grade Qld copper-gold sparks drilling blitz
news.snippet: True North Copper has begun reverse-circulation and diamond drilling at its Wallace North copper-gold deposit in northwest Queensland, aimed at growing a near-mine resource.

news.title: Super move which could cost Aussies $57,000
news.snippet: Panicked super fund members are making a move which potentially costs them tens of thousands in retirement savings.

news.title: Housing Australia says 48,000 migrant first homebuyers have used 5 per cent deposit scheme
news.snippet: Australian taxpayers have helped nearly 50,000 migrants purchase new homes since mid-2023 under a generous scheme available to non-citizens.

news.title: McKeown 'too harsh' on herself, fights off Gold Coast bugs at Aus Open
Government issues ‘emergency’ order for truckers over fuel crisis
news.snippet: A draft determination issued by the workplace relations minister late on Tuesday paves the way for trucking costs to be increased throughout the economy.

news.title: Researchers behind viral AI prediction visited Hormuz on a speedboat. This is what they saw
news.snippet: A Citrini Research analyst went to Strait of Hormuz to see what exactly is happening to the globe’s most vital energy artery. Their findings were startling.

news.title: Red Metal spins out Maronan share bounty for holders
news.snippet: Red Metal Ltd shareholders have scored an Easter bonus, set to receive a planned in-specie distribution of one Maronan Metals share for every 5.25 Red Metal shares held.

news.title: ‘Patriot agenda’: Nats leader’s plan for Aus
news.snippet: Newly-minted Nationals leader Matt Canavan will use his National Press Club debut to outline a “revolution” for Australia – including a “patriot agenda” for economic revival.
